description: FI-2027 and FA-112 cannot coexist in the same engine program. FI-2027's extended tip geometry physically interferes with FA-112's rail bracket clearance.
EP-V8 / MY2025 entered release freeze on 2024-06-01. No part substitutions are permitted within 90 days of Job-1 (2024-09-01) without a formal derogation.
FI-2027 requires Fuel Pump FP-44 (high-pressure variant, 350 bar) for correct fuel delivery. EP-V8 currently uses FP-38 (standard pressure, 250 bar), which is incompatible.
FI-2027 was subject to Corrective Action CA-2022-441 in EP-V6 pilot due to injector tip coking at high-cycle thermal loads. CA resolved but flag retained pending 50K-mile durability confirmation.

EP-V8 / MY2024 entered release freeze on 2023-06-01. This program year has already passed Job-1 and is in production. Any changes require a formal Production Part Approval Process (PPAP) and engineering sign-off.

EC-505 Next-Gen ECU requires high-density Wiring Harness WH-088 to support its expanded 128-pin connector array. EP-V8 currently uses WH-077 (64-pin), which is electrically and physically incompatible with EC-505.
EX-203 Lite manifold uses a 6-bolt flange pattern designed for the V8 cylinder block (CB-015). It is dimensionally incompatible with the V6 cylinder block CB-016, which uses a 4-bolt offset flange.

EX-203 Lite manifold exhibited thermal warping (>0.3mm) at sustained high-load conditions during EP-V6 bench testing in 2024. Issue logged under Corrective Action CA-2024-118. Full durability validation not yet complete.

SC-015 Gen2 sensor cluster uses a broadband RF emission profile that causes interference with TH-302's position sensor in the EP-I4 intake cavity. The two parts cannot operate reliably together in the EP-I4 packaging envelope.

SC-015 Gen2 exhibited calibration drift of ±4% at cold-start temperatures below -15°C during EP-I4 validation testing. Logged under Corrective Action CA-2024-207. Approved for warm-climate programs only pending cold-weather re-validation.
